label: reason_picker_sheet
translation_notes: Modal bottom-sheet CSS override → @radix-ui/react-dialog with data-side='bottom' + custom dark theme tokens
Local useState(sel/other) → useForm + zodResolver with .min(5) for 'other' branch
reasons[] prop with .map → shadcn RadioGroup/RadioGroupItem replacing custom sc-reason-btn buttons
canSubmit guard → form.formState.isValid + server action with audit log write on submit
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.reason_picker.*') keys
onConfirm callback pattern → optimistic update + server action returning Result<void, AppError>
known_bugs: BL-SCN-01: bottom-sheet is CSS-override approach, should be refactored to dedicated ScannerModal primitive

label: fefo_deviation_sheet
translation_notes: Side-by-side sc-cmp-grid div layout → CSS Grid 2-col with shadcn Card for suggested vs chosen LP
Local reason useState + native <select> → shadcn Select component with zodResolver enum validation
Banner 'audit log' note → production Banner must link to actual AuditLogService.write() Server Action
onConfirm/onUseFefo dual-path → two separate Server Actions with outbox event emission (FEFO_DEVIATION / FEFO_OVERRIDE_REVERTED)
Hard-coded SCN_REASONS_FEFO array → fetched from /api/reasons?type=fefo at page load, cached via React cache()
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.fefo_deviation.*') keys
known_bugs: BL-SCN-01: bottom-sheet CSS override approach needs refactor

label: best_before_sheet
translation_notes: Modal receives daysLeft prop derived from client date arithmetic → compute server-side in Server Component to avoid clock skew
Native <select> for reason → shadcn Select with fixed option set extracted to a reason enum in shared/constants.ts
canConfirm = !!reason guard → zod .min(1) on reason field, form.formState.isValid drives Button disabled
onConfirm callback → Server Action BestBeforeAcceptance.create() with LP id, reason, userId from session
Hard-coded 3 reason options → reason set should be configurable via Settings (BL-SCN-07 generalization)
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.best_before.*') keys
known_bugs: BL-SCN-07: strings hard-coded Polish, i18n not implemented

label: partial_consume_sheet
translation_notes: missing[] prop with inline deficit list → shadcn Table rows for material/done/req/uom derived from BOM query result
Native <select> for reason → shadcn Select pulling from SCN_REASONS_PARTIAL enum constant
Banner deficit list inline HTML → Table component with color-coded cells (amber done, red deficit)
onConfirm({reason}) callback → Server Action PartialConsumption.confirm() emitting PARTIAL_CONSUME outbox event
Prototype allows proceeding without full BOM — production must enforce V-SCAN-WO-008 rule check server-side
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.partial_consume.*') keys

label: printer_picker_sheet
translation_notes: P2 stub with disabled Print button → production impl calls ZPL print queue Server Action when P2 lands
Static printer card div → fetch available printers from /api/printers?site={siteId} with online/offline status badge
Banner 'P2' info → remove banner in P2, replace with actual printer selector list
onSkip callback → maintain in production as fallback for 'print from desktop' workflow
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.printer.*') keys
known_bugs: BL-SCN-02: printer integration deferred to P2

label: language_sheet
translation_notes: Hard-coded opts[] with flag emoji → read supported locales from next-intl routing.locales config, derive labels from Intl.DisplayNames
Local useState(sel) for selection → persist chosen locale to user session (DB user_preferences.locale) via Server Action
onApply(sel) callback triggers no re-render in prototype (BL-SCN-07) → production must call router.replace() with new locale segment
sc-reason-btn pattern reused for language items → shadcn RadioGroup/RadioGroupItem with locale flag in RadioGroupItem slot
Hard-coded Polish strings in options → locale labels auto-generated by Intl.DisplayNames in target locale
Hard-coded Polish UI strings → next-intl t('scanner.language.*') — bootstrapped before locale switch completes
known_bugs: BL-SCN-07: language apply functional but i18n re-render not implemented — strings stay Polish after switch

label: logout_sheet
translation_notes: Destructive Btn variant='d' → shadcn Button variant='destructive' with aria-label='Confirm logout'
Banner warns about offline queue data loss → production must drain/persist offline queue before allowing logout (BL-SCN-03)
onConfirm callback → Server Action Session.invalidate() + redirect to /scanner/login
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.logout.*') keys
known_bugs: BL-SCN-03: offline queue not implemented — logout may lose unsynced operations

label: scan_error_sheet
translation_notes: Banner kind='err' for error message → shadcn Alert with variant='destructive' and AlertTitle/AlertDescription
code prop displayed as uppercase hint → map error codes to i18n keys; code shown only in debug mode (env check)
onRetry callback → clear scan state and re-focus ScanInputArea via ref
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.scan_error.*') keys

label: qty_keypad_sheet
translation_notes: Custom 12-key sc-numpad button grid → extract as standalone NumpadInput primitive with CSS Grid 3-col, reuse across all flow screens
val string state with custom press() logic → controlled numeric input with parseFloat validation; enforce max prop server-side too
Decimal handling (leading zero strip, single dot) → use zod .number().min(0).max(max) with coerce on form submit
Monospace display div for current value → shadcn Input readOnly with tabular-nums font class
onConfirm(val) returns string → production should return number; let Server Action validate range
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.keypad.*') keys

label: block_fullscreen
translation_notes: position:absolute inset:0 overlay → React Portal rendered outside scanner shell, z-index managed via CSS custom property --z-block
Static error icon + title + message → shadcn Alert with variant='destructive' sized fullscreen, icon slot for the X mark
Hard-coded red color vars → map to Tailwind destructive token (bg-destructive, text-destructive-foreground)
onRetry / onClose dual action buttons → Server Action should reset LP lock before allowing retry
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.block_fullscreen.*') keys
code prop shown in production only in debug builds → guard with process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_DEBUG_ERRORS

label: lp_locked_sheet
translation_notes: Static 'seconds' prop → production must poll /api/lp/{lp}/lock-status to get real remaining TTL, display countdown
Banner kind='warn' → shadcn Alert variant='warning' (custom token or use default + amber class)
Hard-coded lockedBy string → fetch from LP lock record joined to users table
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.lp_locked.*') keys

label: home_screen
translation_notes: SCN_HOME_GROUPS + SCN_TILES mock arrays → fetch from /api/scanner/menu?userId={id}&role={role} to get RBAC-filtered tiles server-side
onOpenFlow(t.key) callback → Next.js router.push('/scanner/flow/'+t.key) replacing client-side state machine
sc-mitem button list → shadcn NavigationMenu or plain <a> wrapped button list with prefetch for flow pages
SCN_USER avatar + context bar → read from session (Next-Auth/Lucia session) server component, no prop drilling
Toast local state → replace with sonner Toaster + toast() calls, removing custom Toast component
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.home.*') keys

label: settings_screen
translation_notes: Local useState per toggle (sounds/vibrate/autoAdv/scanMode) → persist all settings to user_preferences table via Server Action on change, read from DB on page load
Inline Row + Toggle sub-components → shadcn Switch with Label, extracted to shared ScannerSettingRow server component
sc-segmented scan mode picker → shadcn ToggleGroup (single) for Hardware/Camera/Manual
PIN change row links nowhere → wire to /scanner/settings/pin-change page (BL-SCN-04 PIN setup flow)
Hard-coded language display in sd desc → read from user_preferences.locale, format with Intl.DisplayNames
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.settings.*') keys
known_bugs: BL-SCN-04: PIN setup/change flows only 6-digit entry done, not full setup wizard
BL-SCN-07: language picker functional but i18n re-render not implemented

label: login_screen
translation_notes: Badge scan input (sc-sinput) + email/password fallback → two separate Next-Auth credentials providers: BadgeCredentials + PasswordCredentials; autoFocus on badge field
tryLogin() client validation → move to Server Action with bcrypt compare for password path, badge lookup for scan path
Hard-coded email placeholder 'j.kowalski@forza.pl' → remove from production, use empty placeholder
err state inline div → shadcn Alert variant='destructive' with FormMessage pattern
GhostBtn '→ PIN login' → shadcn Button variant='ghost' linking to /scanner/login/pin
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.login.*') keys
known_bugs: BL-SCN-04: only 6-digit PIN entry done, setup wizard deferred

label: pin_screen
translation_notes: Custom sc-numpad button grid + press() → extract NumpadInput primitive (same as qty_keypad_sheet), reuse across both screens
sc-pin-dots 6-dot row → shadcn custom OTP Input or array of 6 div elements with filled/err CSS classes via cn()
Demo auto-accept any 6 digits → production: Server Action PIN.verify(userId, hashedPin) with bcrypt, return session token on match
triesLeft local state hard-coded at 5 → production must persist attempt count in DB (pin_attempts table) with lockout after 5 failures
err shake animation class → add Tailwind animate-shake (custom keyframe) to dot row on error
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.pin.*') keys
known_bugs: BL-SCN-04: PIN setup/change flows not implemented
BL-QA-06: virtual-keypad PIN anti-keylogger not implemented — currently plain masked input

label: site_select_screen
translation_notes: SCN_SITES / SCN_LINES / SCN_SHIFTS mock arrays → Server Component fetches sites+lines+shifts from DB filtered by user.allowed_sites from RBAC
sc-opt-card for site, sc-opt-mini grid for line/shift → shadcn RadioGroup variants: RadioGroupCard for sites, RadioGroupPill grid for lines/shifts
summary string derived from selected values → computed in Server Component, passed as prop; use Intl.DateTimeFormat for shift hours
canGo = site && line && shift guard → form.formState.isValid with zod object requiring all three fields
on 'Start Shift' → Server Action ShiftContext.create({siteId, lineId, shiftId, userId}) sets session context + redirects to /scanner/home
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.site_select.*') keys; stored-context pre-fill per BL-SCN-08
known_bugs: BL-SCN-08: site-select stored-context pre-fill not implemented

label: po_list_screen
translation_notes: SCN_POS mock filtered with client-side .filter() → Server Component with Drizzle query WHERE code ILIKE '%q%' OR supplier ILIKE '%q%', paginated
ScanInputArea onChange triggers re-render → use React Server Component with searchParams for SSR filtering, or client-side with useDeferredValue
sc-litem button list → shadcn CommandList or plain list items with urgency dot badge via Badge variant
Urgency dot urg-red/amber class → Tailwind conditional classes cn('h-2 w-2 rounded-full', urgency==='red' && 'bg-destructive')
onOpenPo callback → router.push('/scanner/receive/po/'+poCode)
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.po_list.*') keys

label: po_lines_screen
translation_notes: sc-wo-card summary header → shadcn Card with CardHeader/CardContent, metadata as a dl grid
pct / done computed inline from received/ordered → compute server-side in Drizzle query using SQL expression
sc-crow checklist rows with cck-ok/warn/empty states → shadcn Table with CheckCircle/Clock/Circle icon from lucide-react
Color-coded qty display (green done, amber partial) → Tailwind conditional text-green-400 / text-amber-400
onOpenLine callback → router.push('/scanner/receive/po/'+poCode+'/line/'+lineId)
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.po_lines.*') keys

label: po_item_screen
translation_notes: 4-step local useState wizard → Next.js multi-step form using URL searchParam ?step=0..3 for deep-linkable back-navigation without double-push
autoExtract() GS1-128 parse simulation → production: Server Action GS1Parser.parse(barcode) using gs1-barcode-parser npm; returns {gtin, batch, expiry}
Best-before date check with hard-coded today new Date('2026-04-21') → replace with server clock from Server Action, compare against lp.expiry
overWarn two-click override pattern → production must emit PO_OVERRECEIVE outbox event with supervisor approval gate if qty > po_line.ordered * 1.1
Step 3 QtyKeypadSheet for qty entry → NumpadInput primitive (reused), value bound via useFormContext from parent react-hook-form instance
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.po_item.*') keys; SCN_QUICK_LOCS → fetch from /api/locations/quick?site={siteId}

label: po_done_screen
translation_notes: sc-success-wrap with checkmark + title → reusable SuccessScreen layout component shared across all done screens
sc-lp-card showing new LP details → shadcn Card with monospace font for LP number, derived from Server Action response
Detail prop passed from wizard step → production: read from URL searchParam or re-fetch from DB after Server Action completes
bbNote conditional Banner → display only when audit record exists in DB for this LP receipt
P2 print button → wired to PrinterPickerSheet which is P2 stub; keep disabled in P1 with tooltip
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.po_done.*') keys

label: to_list_screen
translation_notes: SCN_TOS mock → Server Component Drizzle query transfer_orders WHERE status IN ('in_transit','ready') AND to_site = session.siteId
ScanInputArea for TO number → same scan-to-filter pattern as po_list_screen, useDeferredValue on client
sc-litem list with status chips → same list item pattern as PoListScreen, Badge for status
onOpenTo callback → router.push('/scanner/receive/to/'+toCode)

label: to_scan_screen
translation_notes: Local state[] array tracking confirmed[] → useReducer with CONFIRM_LP / RESET actions; derive confirmed count from state
tryScan validation against state.lps → Server Action TO.confirmLP(toCode, lpCode) validates LP belongs to TO and marks confirmed in DB
sc-crow checklist with cck-ok / cck-empty → same CheckCircle/Circle pattern as po_lines_screen
Partial acceptance Banner → persist partial TO receipt with TO_PARTIAL_RECEIVE outbox event, remaining LPs stay in_transit status
Demo buttons simulate scan → remove from production; add keyboard event listener for hardware scanner HID input
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.to_scan.*') keys

label: putaway_scan_screen
translation_notes: submit() validates LP prefix client-side → production Server Action LP.findForPutaway(code) enforces status available/qc_pending in DB
SCN_LPS[code] mock lookup → Drizzle query lp_units WHERE lp = code, joined to products for product name and uom
expiry color classification (red/amber/green) by days → compute days_until_expiry in SQL with EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM expiry - NOW())/86400, map to color in component
MiniGrid for LP details → shared LpDetailGrid server component reused across putaway/pick/consume flows
onSuggest(lp) callback → router.push('/scanner/putaway/suggest') with lp serialized as searchParam or stored in sessionStorage

submit() checks code === suggested.code for override detection → Server Action Putaway.confirm(lpId, locationCode) detects deviation server-side
Override path opens ReasonPickerSheet → same modal as modals.jsx reason_picker_sheet, reasons fetched from /api/reasons?type=putaway
sc-quick-grid shortcut buttons → fetch SCN_QUICK_LOCS from /api/locations/quick?zone=putaway&site={siteId}
onDone({override, reason}) → Server Action Putaway.create() emits PUTAWAY_COMPLETE or PUTAWAY_OVERRIDE_REASON outbox events

filter pills (all/my_line/incomplete) → URL searchParam ?filter=all|my_line|incomplete, server-side WHERE clause
q search bar → useDeferredValue on client or searchParam server-side ILIKE filter

onOpenPick(wo) → router.push('/scanner/pick/'+wo.wo)

sc-next-sug next-pick suggestion card → shadcn Card with info icon, derived from first BOM line WHERE status != 'ok'
sc-crow BOM component rows with location badge (cyan) → shadcn Table rows with Badge for location code
FEFO suggestion shown in sc-cdet → fetch from lp_units WHERE lp = bom.lpSuggested in same Drizzle query

FefoDeviationSheet triggered on FEFO mismatch → same modal as modals.jsx fefo_deviation_sheet, shared across pick and consume flows
QtyKeypadSheet for qty entry → NumpadInput primitive reused; production Server Action validates qty <= lp.available_qty

BOM component sc-crow checklist → same Table pattern as pick_list_screen, CheckCircle/Clock/Circle icons
BottomActions tall with 3 buttons (Continue/Pause/BOM Detail) → shadcn ButtonGroup or stacked buttons with appropriate variants

sc-srow scanned items list → alternate Table variant (read-only) with CheckCircle icon and LP/batch/qty columns
Missing materials Banner kind='warn' → shadcn Alert variant='warning' with bulleted missing list
4-button BottomActions (Scan/Output/Coproduct/Waste) → shadcn ButtonGroup with variant mapping: p→default, s→success, v→violet, w→warning

label: consume_scan_screen
translation_notes: submitScan() multi-gate LP validation (format/exists/consumed/qa_hold/use_by/best_before/FEFO) → Server Action Consume.validateLP(lpCode, bomLine, woCode) returns typed Result union with all gate codes
use_by hard-block triggers BlockFullscreen → production: BlockFullscreen remains a client component over the page, Server Action returns USE_BY_EXPIRED error code
best_before 7-day window check with hard-coded today → Server Action computes days_until_expiry server-side with UTC clock
FEFO deviation detected and triggers FefoDeviationSheet → same pattern as pick_scan_screen; both flows share Server Action LP.checkFefoDeviation()
QtyKeypadSheet for quantity entry → NumpadInput primitive; production validates qty <= lp.available_qty and qty <= bom.remaining_req
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.consume_scan.*') keys; error code strings → map to i18n keys in error boundary

label: output_screen
translation_notes: 4-step wizard (qty/batch+expiry/location/confirm) → URL searchParam ?step=0..3 with react-hook-form useFormContext spanning steps
yieldPct inline calculation → Server Action Output.calculateYield(woCode, newQty) to avoid rounding inconsistencies with planned quantities
Missing materials check triggers PartialConsumeSheet on submit → Server Action Output.validate(woCode) returns missing[] before allowing registration
Step 3 ScanInputArea for location + SCN_QUICK_LOCS grid → /api/locations/quick?type=fg_output&site={siteId} server fetch
LP number generation Math.floor(800+...) → production: Server Action Output.register() calls LP registry service which issues sequential LP number

label: coproduct_screen
translation_notes: SCN_COPRODUCTS[woCode] mock → Server Component fetches bom_coproducts WHERE wo_code = woCode from DB
Native <select> for co-product selection → shadcn Select with options from co-product list; show allocPct in option label
Individual sc-fgroup fields for qty/batch/expiry/location → useForm with zod schema; FormField per field
LP type hard-coded 'co_product' (violet) → production LP registry must accept lp_type = 'co_product', inherit source WO
submit() random LP generation → Server Action Coproduct.register() calls LP registry, emits COPRODUCT_REGISTERED outbox event
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.coproduct.*') keys

label: waste_screen
translation_notes: SCN_WASTE_CATS mock → Server Component fetches waste_categories WHERE active = true from settings; each has id/label/icon/cls
sc-cat-btn category selector grid → shadcn RadioGroup with custom card-style RadioGroupItem rendering icon + label
Native <select> for production phase → shadcn Select with hard-coded phase options extracted to wastePhase enum in shared/constants.ts
Textarea for notes → shadcn Textarea with FormField; notes are optional so no min() zod constraint
submit() canSubmit guard → form.formState.isValid; Server Action Waste.register(woCode, cat, qty, phase, notes) emits WASTE_REGISTERED outbox event
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.waste.*') keys; waste categories labels should also be i18n'd via settings

label: move_screen
translation_notes: Two-phase scan (LP then destination) → two ScanInputArea components sequentially shown, each backed by Server Action validation
onLpScan() qa_hold/consumed guards → Server Action Move.validateLP(code) returns typed error union; also acquires 5-min pessimistic lock
Banner '5 min lock' → production: lock record in lp_locks table with expires_at = NOW() + 5min; heartbeat from client every 60s
sc-quick-grid location shortcuts → /api/locations/quick?type=move&site={siteId} server fetch, cached via Next.js fetch cache
onDone({lp, from, to}) → Server Action Move.execute(lpId, destLocationCode) releases lock + emits LP_MOVED outbox event
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.move.*') keys

label: split_scan_screen
translation_notes: onScan() validates LP status === 'available' and qty > 0 → Server Action Split.validateLP(code) with RBAC check (split requires warehouse_operator role minimum)
Banner 'Split preserves batch' → keep as shadcn Alert info in production, this is an important UX affordance for traceability
MiniGrid LP preview → shared LpDetailGrid server component reused from putaway/move flows
onNext(lp) passes lp object → use URL searchParam ?lp=LP-XXXXX; next screen re-fetches from DB to avoid stale data
SCN_LPS mock lookup → Drizzle query lp_units WHERE lp = code JOIN products
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.split_scan.*') keys

label: split_qty_screen
translation_notes: origRem computed inline (lp.qty - qty) → compute in Server Action after validation to ensure no floating-point drift
sc-split-grid 2-col before/after preview → shadcn Card with 2-col grid; left = original LP remaining, right = new LP preview
valid guard: 0 < qty < lp.qty → zod .number().positive().max(lp.qty - 0.001) validated in both client form and Server Action
Auto LP number 'LP-XXXX (auto)' preview → show placeholder until Server Action Split.execute() returns actual new LP number
QtyKeypadSheet for numeric entry → NumpadInput primitive, max = lp.qty - 0.01 enforced
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.split_qty.*') keys

label: qa_list_screen
translation_notes: SCN_QA mock array → Server Component Drizzle query lp_qa_tasks WHERE status = 'pending' AND site = session.siteId ORDER BY urgency DESC
sc-litem list with urgency dot → urgency derived from lp.age days; color badge same pattern as po_list_screen
ScanInputArea scan-to-find → jump directly to /scanner/qa/{lpCode} on scan, skipping list navigation
Age + inspection type displayed in sc-lsub → compute age = NOW() - lp.created_at in SQL, format with Intl.RelativeTimeFormat
onInspect(lp) → router.push('/scanner/qa/'+lp)
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.qa_list.*') keys

label: qa_inspect_screen
translation_notes: SCN_LPS fallback with hardcoded LP mock → Server Component fetches full lp_unit JOIN qa_tasks JOIN products; no client fallback needed
sc-big3 3-button action row (Pass/Reject/Hold) → 3 shadcn Buttons: variant='default' for PASS, variant='destructive' for REJECT, variant='outline' (amber) for HOLD
Optional notes textarea inline → shadcn Textarea with FormField, notes passed to onResult callback then to Server Action
onResult({lpCode, result, notes}) → Server Action QA.submitResult(lpCode, result, notes); REJECT route pushes to /scanner/qa/{lp}/fail-reason
MiniGrid 4-row layout (8 cells) → shared LpDetailGrid with additional fields: WO ref, age, inspection type
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.qa_inspect.*') keys

label: qa_fail_reason_screen
translation_notes: sc-reason-list with SCN_QA_REASONS → shadcn RadioGroup; reasons fetched from /api/reasons?type=qa_rejection
sel/other/extra three-field state → useForm with zod discriminatedUnion: when sel='other' require other.min(5), extra always optional
Btn variant='d' (destructive) creates NCR → Server Action NCR.create(lpCode, reason, notes) emits NCR_CREATED outbox event, updates LP status to 'rejected'
LP header display (monospace code) → shared LpCodeDisplay primitive with monospace font, reused across QA screens
needsOther conditional textarea → conditional FormField render based on watchField('sel') === 'other'
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.qa_fail_reason.*') keys

label: inquiry_screen
translation_notes: P2 preview screen with static LP history → mark as P2 in router with feature flag guard: if (!flags.scanner_lp_inquiry) redirect to /scanner/home
SCN_LPS[code] mock lookup → Server Action LP.findWithHistory(code) joining lp_movements, users, locations
Static hard-coded movement history list → in P2 replace with actual lp_movements timeline component using shadcn Timeline (custom) or Table
MiniGrid 4-row (8 cells) → same LpDetailGrid server component; add qaStatus and status fields
Banner 'P2 preview' → remove in P2 production; replace with full traceability tree when LP genealogy is implemented
Hard-coded Polish strings → next-intl t('scanner.inquiry.*') keys
known_bugs: BL-TEC-02: traceability screen static — needs real WO_LIST cross-module link in P2
